channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US soldiers killed by Iran were from Texas and Hawaii, military says
item.description: The U.S. military has identified two soldiers killed in action last week as part of the war with Iran.

item.title: The Tate brothers fight extradition to the UK where they face rape and sex trafficking charges
Nolan Wells remembered for his gentle spirit as Rev. Al Sharpton demands truth about his death
